programs.title: The Big Bang Theory
programs.desc: Raj and Howard set up an online dating profile for Sheldon and find the perfect woman.

programs.title: The Conners
programs.sub_title: Walden Pond, a Staycation and the Axis Powers
programs.desc: Dan feels helpless when Louise refuses to let him put himself at risk for her; when Jackie learns the competing restaurants are posting negative reviews about The Lunch Box, she recruits Neville to help her confront them.

programs.title: The Conners
programs.desc: Becky meets up with an old friend and feels pressured to impress him; Dan questions his position at the hardware store, which leads to a massive fight with Ben.

programs.title: Friends
programs.sub_title: The One with the Two Parties
programs.desc: Rachel's separated parents (Marlo Thomas, Ron Leibman) unexpectedly attend her surprise birthday party.

programs.title: Friends
programs.sub_title: The One With the Chicken Pox
programs.desc: Phoebe's romantic meeting with an old friend (Charlie Sheen) is stalled by a case of the chickenpox; Ben celebrates his first birthday; Monica frets about her relationship with Richard (Tom Selleck).

programs.title: Friends
programs.sub_title: The One With Barry and Mindy's Wedding
programs.desc: Rachel is a bridesmaid at her ex-fiancé's wedding; she has flashbacks of her own failed wedding day; Monica and Richard's relationship is jeopardized when the subject of children is discussed.
